subcodes.first_line: The Call of God has assuredly been raised up from the right-hand side of the Divine Throne [uttering the words]: “I, verily, am God, the Unique, the Peerless, the One
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارتفع ندآء الله عن یمین العرش انی انا الله الواحد الفرد الاحد لاتمنعوا
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @knowledge; recognition of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
